About Pollamgattu

A Farmstay Rooted
in Nature & Tradition

Pollamgattu is a thoughtfully curated farmstay surrounded by nature, culture and calm. Experience the perfect blend of comfort and simplicity.

Walk the fields at dawn, eat food grown on the land, and spend evenings under a sky full of stars. This is what rest is supposed to feel like.

Moments from Pollamgattu

✕
What We Offer

Experiences & Amenities

🏕️
Thatched Roof Stay
Traditional countryside architecture with naturally cool interiors and rustic charm.
🍳
Farm Kitchen
Three meals daily cooked on wood fire with produce from our fields.
🌾
Farm Walks
Guided walks through paddy fields, orchards and vegetable patches.
🔥
Barbeque Night
Evening barbeque under open skies — smoky, social and unforgettable.
🎬
Outdoor Projector
Watch films on the open lawn under the stars — bring your requests.
🧘
Yoga Lawn
Open-air morning yoga at 6:30 AM on the freshly-cut lawn.
📶
Wi-Fi Available
Reliable connectivity when needed — though we encourage you not to.
🌙
Stargazing
Zero light pollution. The Milky Way visible on clear nights.
🐄
Farm Animals
Cows, goats, hens. Kids love the morning milking ritual.
📵
Digital Detox
Designed for stillness — your screen can wait, the farm cannot.
Reserve Your Escape

Plan Your
Stay

Weekends fill up fast — especially October through March. Book at least 2 weeks ahead. Minimum 1 night; 2 nights recommended.

💰
Pricing
₹8,000 per night for up to 6 guests. Extra guests: ₹1,000 per person.
🏡
Entire Facility
Exclusive access to the full property. Spacious hall suitable for 10 to 20 daytime guests, along with two bedrooms — one air-conditioned room and one room with air cooler.
💬
WhatsApp Confirmation
We confirm your booking on WhatsApp within 4 hours.
  • ✓ Check-in 2:00 PM · Check-out 11:00 AM
  • ✓ Free cancellation up to 7 days before arrival
  • ✓ 30% advance payment to confirm booking
  • ✓ Pets allowed (prior intimation required)
  • ✓ No alcohol — it's a farm, not a resort

Guest Stories

What Guests Say

★★★★★

We came for a weekend and stayed five days. Woke up to birdsong, ate incredible ragi mudde, and stared at stars we'd forgotten existed.

SR
Sunitha R.
Hyderabad · Family of 4 · March 2025
★★★★★

Perfect corporate retreat. Zero distractions and team bonding around the barbeque that no city outing can match. We'll be back.

AK
Arjun K.
IT Team Lead · Group of 14 · Jan 2025
★★★★★

My kids milked a cow, planted seeds, then watched a film under the stars on the outdoor projector. Haven't seen them this happy in years.

PM
Priya M.
Secunderabad · Family · Nov 2024
★★★★★

Drove from Pune for a long weekend. No frills, just honest countryside living at its best.

VN
Vikram N.
Pune · Couple · Oct 2024
★★★★★

Yoga at dawn, barbeque at dusk — this place has the perfect rhythm. Been dreaming about their tomato rasam for three months.

RD
Rohit D.
Bangalore · Solo · Dec 2024
★★★★★

Celebrated my parents' 40th anniversary here. Hosts made everything feel genuinely personal. Absolutely unforgettable.

SB
Shruti B.
Hyderabad · Anniversary · Feb 2025
Find Us

We're in Chanvelli, Chevella

Address & Contact

Pollamgattu Farmstay
Chanvelli Village, Chevella Mandal
Ranga Reddy District, Telangana — 501503

📞 +91 91770 00010
✉ nishantakula123@gmail.com
💬 WhatsApp Us

🚘
By Car from Hyderabad
Via Outer Ring Road → NH 163 → Chevella. Approx 60 mins. Pickup from Chevella town on request.
🚌
By Bus
TSRTC from Majestic Bus Stand to Chevella every 30 mins. Auto to Chanvelli village.
🚂
Nearest Railway
Lingampally or Shadnagar station. Directions shared after booking.
